verdict_summary: PNG renders cleanly: side-by-side probabilistic (fan-out) and deterministic (linear) flows are legible, branches are prominent, no overlap or truncation, no scope creep.

findings.detail: Layout is flowchart LR at the root level (Mermaid rendered the two subgraphs side-by-side, Probabilistic on the left, Deterministic on the right). No overlapping nodes. The three-branch fan-out from 'Process + Randomness' to Output A / Output B / Output C is prominently visible and the central visual idea of the topic. Labels are large and fully legible at 1400px. Color palette correct: blue input nodes, purple process nodes, green output nodes. Title banner 'Same input — different result each time: the probabilistic system' renders at the top. No scope-creep nodes (no LLMs, ML, statistical model, temperature).
